heading: Imposition of sanctions with respect to persons engaged in the diversion of goods intended for the people of Iran
label: 8514c Imposition of sanctions with respect to persons engaged in the diversion of goods intended for the people of Iran
notes: Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of certain functions and authorities vested in the President by this section, see Memorandum of President of the United States, , 78 F.R. 35545, set out as a note under .June 3, 2013section 8801 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The President shall impose sanctions described in with respect to each person on the list required by subsection (b).section 8514(c) of this title

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 2 Exception
children.text: The requirement to impose sanctions under paragraph (1) shall not include the authority to impose sanctions on the importation of goods.

children.heading: List of persons who engage in diversion
children.label: b List of persons who engage in diversion
A
children.text: the diversion of goods, including agricultural commodities, food, medicine, and medical devices, intended for the people of Iran; or

children.label: B
children.text: the misappropriation of proceeds from the sale or resale of such goods.

children.heading: Form
children.label: A Form
children.text: The list required by paragraph (1) shall be submitted in unclassified form but may contain a classified annex.

children.heading: Public availability
children.label: B Public availability
children.text: The unclassified portion of the list required by paragraph (1) shall be made available to the public and posted on the websites of the Department of the Treasury and the Department of State.

children.heading: Good defined
children.label: c Good defined
children.text: In this section, the term “good” has the meaning given that term in .section 8801(a) of this title
